# Mixed Paragraph and PLAIN

## Definition Immediately After Paragraph

This is a regular paragraph that continues on multiple lines.

Definition term
:   Definition content (PLAIN) continues here.

Another paragraph after the definition spans multiple lines too.

## Adjacent Blocks

Paragraph one continues.

Term A
:   Definition A (PLAIN) continues.

Paragraph two continues.

Term B
:   Definition B (PLAIN) continues.

Paragraph three continues to end.
